# Gemini CLI - Context Guide (Protobuf)

This project contains the communication contracts for the CRAC ecosystem.

### 📜 Mandatory Instructions
For all technical details, commands, and code generation standards, please refer to the **`AGENTS.md`** file in the root of this project.

**CRITICAL MANDATE**: Follow the **Contract-First** development workflow. Never edit generated files manually.

### 🛠 Quick Reference
- **Tech Stack**: Protocol Buffers (v3), gRPC, Python, uv.
- **Main Manual**: [AGENTS.md](./AGENTS.md)
- **Revision Tasks**: [REVISION_GUIDE.md](./REVISION_GUIDE.md)
